Published or released observation: Motion styles depend on coupling between shear-zone volume change and pore-pressure dissipation timescales.
How the criterion is checked: The proposed Pi and R(Pi) isolate the dissipation part of that feedback.
Limit of the check: External conceptual consistency, not direct calibration.

Published or released observation: Undrained tests used closed chamber water lines; naturally drained tests used open lines; pore-water pressure and specimen thickness were measured continuously.
How the criterion is checked: The limiting cases match the model endpoints R approximately 1 for closed drainage and lower R for open drainage as hydraulic time increases.
Limit of the check: A future calibration can ingest the released time series; this manuscript uses the release as an external mode check.

Published or released observation: Road vulnerability depends on physical response, not only hazard presence.
How the criterion is checked: The retained-pressure variable supplies a transparent state descriptor for road cuts, embankments and retaining-system back-slopes.
Limit of the check: Supports engineering interpretation but does not replace site-specific risk modelling.
